title: CobbleCraft S4
description:
The OFFICIAL CobbleCraft Modpack!

This is the place to download and play the CobbleCraft Modpack for your own singleplayer world, or to join the OFFICIAL CobbleCraft server!

(This is the SEASON 4 Version)
body:
This is the OFFCIAL CobbleCraft S4 Modpack!

**All credits are due to the respective devolpers of ALL mods in this modpack.**

This Modpack Includes EVERYTHING. But only whilst keeping performance and FPS high!

This modpack includes the likes of,

Alex's Mobs 🐮


![Taken by Joshauu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcbf1c09e81d2e1cc9b6ff5ca1194d5545bfbf93.png)


Create + Addons ⚙️


![Taken by Joshauu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a19428ab7144df9c36f6d64367327b4601788a39.png)


Simple Planes 🛩️


![Taken by Joshauu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bece0d84fc07a490a2cf6eb2df1b8db3b0d45fd7.png)


Simple Ships 🛥️


![Taken by Joshauu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f05dd3a93e86434a1ce923c667ed41ee15701648.png)


Farmer's Delight + Addons 🍎

![Taken by Joshauu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6455d0a5cb498796bb9fe1264866fead7f98af82.png)


And Much, Much More. ⭐

**All credits are due to the respective devolpers of ALL mods in this modpack.**
